raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 881 establishes safety standards for CO₂ pipelines in California.",
    "AB 915 streamlines local permitting and siting of renewable energy projects by providing financial incentives and technical assistance to local permitting authorities.",
    "AB 366 requires that all first-time DUI offenders install an Ignition Interlock Device on their vehicle.",
    "AB 451 requires California law enforcement agencies to adopt standard policies for enforcing firearm-related restraining orders.",
    "AB 963 ensures that developers using taxpayer dollars on publicly funded projects comply with existing state public contract and labor laws.",
